audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. At line 1855, blob transactions are checked: if max_fee_per_blob_gas >= pending_fees.blob_fee, the ENOUGH_BLOB_FEE_CAP_BLOCK state bit is set, qualifying the transaction for the Pending subpool. Transactions failing this check are accepted into the Blob subpool (queued state) rather than rejected, which is correct mempool behavior—they become eligible when blob_fee decreases.
